    handleException(String, Exception) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.logging.LogData
    Reports exceptions to Sentry and mirrors failure context into Log.txt.
    handleException(String, Exception) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.util.ErrorHandler
    Logs an exception and shows a user-safe error alert.
    hasImage() - Method in class com.sait.workshop05.models.Product
    Returns true when image URL is present.
